title: Radiation Oncologist / Clinical OncologistJob TypeFull TimeQualificationBA/BSc/H
description:
Radiation Oncologist / Clinical OncologistJob 
TypeFull TimeQualificationBA/BSc/HND
Experience1 - 2 years
LocationNairobiJob 
FieldMedical / Healthcare 
Job Overview

The successful candidate will provide comprehensive cancer care using radiation therapy as a core treatment modality. You will lead the patient's journey from diagnosis, treatment planning, and execution to long-term follow-up, working within a multidisciplinary oncology team.
Key Responsibilities:

Diagnose and stage cancer accurately using clinical and imaging data.
Develop individualized, evidence-based radiation treatment plans.
Oversee safe and precise delivery of radiation therapy.
Monitor patients throughout treatment and manage side effects.
Participate in multidisciplinary tumor boards.
Ensure compliance with KNRA safety standards and regulatory requirements.
Provide patient education and compassionate counseling.
Qualifications & Experience:

MBChB from a recognized institution.
MMed in Radiation Oncology/Clinical Oncology.
Specialist registered with KMPDC.
Valid practicing license and professional indemnity cover.
Minimum 1-2 years post-specialization experience.

title: Receptionist
description:
Receptionist at Africa Management Solutions Limited (AMSOL)
Deadline: Mar 16, 2026
Job TypeFull TimeQualificationDiplomaExperience2 yearsLocationNairobiJob FieldAdministration / Secretarial 
Job Summary

Responsible for managing front desk operations, patient registration, appointment scheduling, and maintaining patient records.
Key Responsibilities

Welcome patients and visitors professionally.
Register patients in the HMIS system.
Manage appointments and clinic schedules.
Maintain and organize patient records.
Support administrative and reporting functions.
Requirements

Diploma in Health Records and Information Management or related field.
Minimum 2 years’ experience in a healthcare setting.
Proficiency in HMIS and Microsoft Office.
Method of ApplicationInterested and qualified? Go to Africa Management Solutions Limited (AMSOL) on www.amsol.africa to apply

title: Property Site Sales Officer
description:
Property Site Sales Officer at Etwons Property Consultants
Job Type Full Time , Onsite
Qualification Diploma
Experience 2 years
Location Nairobi
Job Field Real Estate  , Sales / Marketing / Retail / Business Development
The Sales Officers are responsible for generating and closing property sales to meet the set targets for property site. The role involves engaging potential clients, managing the end-to-end sales process, and reporting daily sales performance to the Team Leader.

Responsibilities

Day to day management of site office
Receive and attend to all visitors to the site office
Show case and assist customers during site inspection
Assist customers select units
Maintain site records
Proactively generate leads through project marketing, cold calling, referrals, media, and lead generation platforms, ensuring all activities are recorded in the system.
Manage the full sales journey from lead prospecting to closing, with all interactions documented in the CRM.
Conduct regular market research to benchmark property prices and share insights with the supervisor.
Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports using the CRM.
Build lasting client relationships by offering continuous support, guidance, and relevant property information throughout the customer lifecycle
Represent the company at sales events
Coordinate timely preparation, approval, and follow-up of all client documentation.
Ensure timely collections and adherence to payment plans
Conduct all sales activities in line with legal, regulatory, and organizational standards, while maintaining a high level of professionalism
Requirements

At least a Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in any business related field.
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint) and internet tools.
Minimum of 2 years’ experience in real estate sales or marketing.
Proficient in digital/ social marketing tools and platforms (e.g. Facebook, Instagram, Google etc.) 
Excellent communication skills.
Great interpersonal skills.
Ability to multi-task.
Method of ApplicationInterested and qualified candidates should apply using the Apply Now button below

title: Plumber
description:
Plumber at Profundity
Job Type Full Time , Onsite
Qualification BA/BS/HND , Diploma , First School Leaving Certificate , KCSE
Experience 3 years
Location Nairobi 
Job Field Building and Construction 
We are seeking a skilled plumber with strong troubleshooting and installation experience to support our technical operations. The candidate should also have basic skills in electrical, carpentry, masonry, or general maintenance, which will be an added advantage. The role has growth potential into a Technical Manager position.

Key Responsibilities

Perform plumbing installations, repairs, and maintenance for residential and commercial clients
Diagnose plumbing faults and provide effective solutions
Assist in general maintenance tasks including electrical, carpentry, or masonry where required
Support the Technical Manager with site surveys and project installations
Complete job cards after work completion and ensure customer signatures
Maintain professional interaction with customers during service visits
Assist in identifying materials and tools required for jobs
Ensure work meets quality and safety standards
Report job completion and submit documentation to operations
Support the company’s goal of delivering reliable and efficient technical services
Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: ourfundi@gmail.com using the position as subject of email.
